---
name: New skill idea
about: Suggest a new teaching task the toolkit should cover
title: "[Skill] "
labels: skill-idea
---

**What teaching task eats your time?**
Describe the chore in plain terms, for example "reconciling attendance across three rosters every week."

**What would a good result look like?**
What would you want the AI to hand you at the end?

**Where does the human stay in the loop?**
Every skill keeps you in the decision. Where would you review before anything reaches a student?

**Do you have a prompt or method that already half-works?**
Paste it if so, with any real data removed. Even a rough version helps.
